mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE (ATTENDANCE_SEQ, USERS_ID, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN) VALUES (ATTENDANCE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{users_id}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET CHECK_OUT = SYSTIMESTAMP, TOTAL_WORK_MIN = ROUND( (CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(CHECK_IN AS DATE)) * 24 * 60 ) WHERE USERS_ID = #{users_id} AND WORK_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{users_id} AND WORK_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT ATTENDANCE_SEQ, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{users_id} AND TRUNC(WORK_DATE, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') ORDER BY WORK_DATE DESC

SELECT ATTENDANCE_SEQ, TO_CHAR(WORK_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{users_id} AND TRUNC(WORK_DATE, 'MM') = TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{year_month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MM') AND CHECK_IN IS NOT NULL ORDER BY WORK_DATE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS work_days, ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_WORK_MIN) / 60, 1) AS total_hours, SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CHECK_IN, 'HH24:MI') > '09:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_cnt, (SELECT NVL(SUM(v.DAYS), 0) FROM VACATION v JOIN DRAFT_DOCUMENTS dd ON v.DOC_SEQ = dd.DOC_SEQ WHERE dd.USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND dd.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND TO_CHAR(v.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') ) AS vac_cnt FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND TO_CHAR(WORK_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') GROUP BY USERS_ID

SELECT NVL(A.work_days, 0) AS "work_days", NVL(A.late_cnt, 0) AS "late_cnt",
(SELECT NVL(ROUND(SUM(REQUEST_MIN), 1), 0) FROM OVERTIME_REQUEST WHERE USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND WORK_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND WORK_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ) AS "overtime_hours",
(SELECT NVL(SUM(v.DAYS), 0) FROM VACATION v JOIN DRAFT_DOCUMENTS dd ON v.DOC_SEQ = dd.DOC_SEQ WHERE dd.USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND dd.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND v.START_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND v.START_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ) AS "vac_cnt" FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS work_days, SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CHECK_IN, 'HH24:MI') > '09:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_cnt FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND WORK_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND WORK_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ) A
mapper.update: update attendance set check_out = TO_DATE(#{req_check_out}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), total_work_min = ROUND((TO_DATE(#{req_check_out}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - CAST(check_in AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) where attendance_seq = #{attendance_seq}
